description: PR3 scenario #3 — warm-start retention when the baseline is still feasible. All 3 baseline placements are legal (no prayer clash, no lock conflict, instructor free, students free, room fits). After commit 5, every section is retained from baseline; changes_from_baseline_count == 0, unchanged_count == 3, decision_trace shows chosen == baseline with alternatives recorded for transparency.
notes: Decision-trace framing: 'chosen' is the baseline slot; alternatives show other candidates that would have been chosen on a cold start — each with rejection_context noting the baseline was retained to minimise perturbation.
